case_title: CHECK STOP CHECK CASHING VS C & C CHECK CASHING CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CHECK STOP CHECK CASHING AS TO DEFENDANT C & C CHECK CASHING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFED LETTER TO BETTY WILSON (CHECK CASHING) RETURNED FORWARDING TIME HAS EXPIRED.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-10-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF NOV-30-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHECK STOP CHECK CASHING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT C & C CHECK CASHING CO. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED TO SENDER.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT C & C CHECK CASHING CO.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23158, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHECK STOP CHECK CASHING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT C & C CHECK CASHING CO. JUDGM. ORDERED FOR DEFEND. & AGAINST PLTFF. DEFEND. AWARDED $38.00 COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDDGMENT TO DEF.RETURNED RETUR TO SENDER FORWARDING EXPIRE.
